summary: Iteration 39 - HR Module Roles Tab Bug Fixes Verification. All 5 bugs have been fixed and verified through backend API tests (12/12 passed) and frontend UI testing.

bug_1_delete_role.description: Should be able to delete a role
evidence: Backend: DELETE /api/roles/{role_id} endpoint added and working
Backend: Returns 200 with success message on delete
Backend: Protects preset roles (CEO, HR_MANAGER, etc.) - returns 400
Backend: Protects roles with assigned employees - returns 400
Frontend: Delete Role button (red) visible in edit modal for non-preset roles
Frontend: Delete button NOT visible for preset roles (CEO, HR_MANAGER)

bug_2_copy_role_permissions.description: When copying a role (CEO to CTO), permissions/checks are not copied
evidence: Backend: RoleCreate model now includes 'permissions' field
Backend: Permissions are stored with role on creation
Frontend: RoleModal useEffect properly copies permissions from source role
Frontend: When copying CEO, all CEO permissions are pre-checked in modal
Screenshot shows 4 permissions (Dashboard, Leads View+Edit) pre-checked when copying

bug_3_edit_role.description: Unable to edit a role after creating it
evidence: Backend: PUT /api/roles/{role_id} endpoint working
Backend: RoleUpdate model includes 'permissions' field
Backend: Permissions are updated correctly
Frontend: Edit modal opens with role data pre-filled
Frontend: Can modify name and permissions
Frontend: Update button saves changes
Frontend: DialogContent has 'max-h-[90vh] flex flex-col' classes
Frontend: Content area has 'overflow-y-auto flex-1' for scrolling
Frontend: Footer has 'flex-shrink-0' to stay fixed
Screenshot shows modal is contained within viewport with scrollable content

bug_5_button_text.description: While editing, button should say 'Update' not 'Create'
evidence: Frontend: Button text is conditional: {isEdit ? 'Update' : 'Create'}
Frontend: isEdit = !!role?.id (true only when role has ID)
Screenshot shows 'Update' button in edit modal

critical_code_review_comments: All 5 bugs have been properly fixed
Backend API properly validates preset roles and roles with employees before deletion
Frontend modal properly handles scroll overflow with max-h-[90vh]
Permissions are now stored with roles and copied correctly
seed_data_creation: Test roles created during testing were cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 Roles Tab bugs have been fixed. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_roles_crud.py cover all CRUD operations including delete protection for preset roles.

backend_tests.test_01_get_all_roles: PASS - Returns list of roles with preset roles
backend_tests.test_02_create_role_with_permissions: PASS - Creates role with permissions saved
backend_tests.test_03_update_role_permissions: PASS - Updates role name and permissions

frontend_tests.add_role_modal_scroll: PASS - Modal has max-h-[90vh] and overflow-y-auto
frontend_tests.delete_button_hidden: PASS - Hidden for preset roles (CEO, HR_MANAGER)
frontend_tests.permissions_copied: PASS - Permissions pre-checked when copying role
